title: Arm AGI CPU explained..
summary: Arm announced a new AGI CPU targeting agentic use cases as hyperscalers increasingly customize semiconductor solutions. The CPU market faces high capital intensity and time-to-market risks, with Arm working through TSMC to manage supply chains and compete against other chip vendors.
